papers_mined.title: Hadza language (Wikipedia)
papers_mined.note: Hadzabe language isolate; ~1000 speakers Lake Eyasi Tanzania; one of three East African click languages; click consonants + ejective + prenasalized.

papers_mined.title: East African Click Languages Hadza Hazane (Language Closet 2025)
papers_mined.note: Hadza phonology with extensive click consonant inventory + lateral click laminal articulation distinct from Khoisan.
